topics.title: Theme Song Feedback and Upcoming Performances
topics.summary: The studio discusses listener backlash regarding a proposed change to the show's intro music, a humorous spelling exercise with a caller, personal anecdotes about past acting roles, and upcoming performances at Carnegie Hall.

topics.title: Listener Feedback and Guest Commentary
topics.summary: The show reviews listener reactions to a recent guest appearance by Cindy Margolis while discussing various topics including celebrity appearances, local news, and personal anecdotes regarding vehicle modifications and driving experiences.

topics.title: Sirius Satellite Growth and Media Partnerships
topics.summary: The studio discusses the growth of Sirius satellite radio following Howard Stern's move, the upcoming NASCAR deal, and various media personalities.

topics.title: Football Pool and Adult Video Promotion
topics.summary: The studio features a series of callers providing football picks for a contest while one guest promotes his adult video content.

topics.title: Artie Lange Carnegie Hall Performance
topics.summary: The studio discusses Artie Lange's upcoming sold-out performance at Carnegie Hall and the logistics of his appearance.

topics.title: Music Copyrights and Celebrity Scandals
topics.summary: The studio explores the legal nuances of music sampling between Fergie and J.J. Fad, discusses a fan's stolen radio equipment, and critiques Britney Spears' public image during her divorce from Kevin Federline.

topics.title: Prostate Health and Dating Segment
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion on prostate health issues and medication side effects followed by an introduction of three women interested in dating Artie.

topics.title: Bachelorette Selection Process
topics.summary: The studio hosts a segment where three women are interviewed and evaluated by Artie based on their personal histories, physical attributes, and sexual preferences.

topics.title: Artie Lane Dating Selection
topics.summary: The studio hosts a segment where Artie Lane is asked to choose between three women who are calling in to share their preferences, personal details, and views on his lifestyle.

topics.title: Artie Lange Dating Game
topics.summary: The studio hosts a dating game segment where Artie Lange selects one of three women to go on a date with, ultimately choosing Stephanie.

topics.title: Selection of Contestants for Convict Competition
topics.summary: The studio evaluates several female candidates with criminal records to determine which participants will be featured in an upcoming contest regarding the 'hottest' women with prison rap sheets.

topics.title: Prank Calls and Celebrity Gossip Games
topics.summary: The show features prank calls to a bakery, discussions about upcoming comedy tours, and a game where guests identify the fake story among several celebrity anecdotes.

topics.title: Sexual Orientation and Media
topics.summary: The show features a segment where the hosts discuss a news story about a teacher's controversial quizzes on homosexuality before transitioning into a personal conversation regarding sexual orientation, past experiences, and celebrity culture.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Sports
topics.summary: The studio explores topics ranging from personal relationships and the publishing of Howard Stern's books to news regarding Anna Nicole Smith, the cancellation of Jesus Camp, and an injury involving Penn State coach Joe Paterno.

topics.title: Sports, Celebrity News, and Cultural Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses a variety of topics including the New York Knicks' coaching contract negotiations, upcoming performances by Bob Dylan, celebrity divorce proceedings involving Reese Witherspoon and Britney Spears, and various news items regarding Walmart's holiday marketing.

topics.title: Iraq War Developments and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The show covers the resignation of Defense Secretary Donald Rumsfeld, reports on escalating violence in Iraq, and discusses celebrity news regarding Britney Spears and upcoming comedy tour dates.
